note: Compound v3 CometRewards mainnet. COVER = claim/claimTo (COMP reward claim -> Airdrop::Claim). claimTo routes rewards to an arbitrary `to` (fund-destination signal). getRewardOwed is an accrue+view; setRewardConfig/transferGovernor/withdrawToken are governor-only.

0xb7034f7e.name: claim
0xb7034f7e.reason: user reward claim: claim accrued COMP for src to src (Airdrop::Claim)

0x4ff85d94.name: claimTo
0x4ff85d94.reason: user reward claim: claim src's COMP to an arbitrary recipient (Airdrop::Claim; fund-destination signal)

0x41e0cad6.name: getRewardOwed
0x41e0cad6.reason: accrues then returns owed amount; informational, moves no caller funds
